sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84692" key="polugalakte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-γᾰλακτέω</orth>, <sense id="n84692.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have much milk,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.640f</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ζῷα -γαλακτοῦντα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:97" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.97</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
